failure_story: Northshore remains intermittently idle, bonus royalties disappear, legal recovery is nil, and trust expenses consume cash while the finite resource depletes.
earliest_warning_signals: Northshore shipments and ordinary royalties remain near fiscal 2026 levels.
Third-party prices remain below the bonus threshold.
Arbitration produces no disclosed schedule, award or settlement.
forensic_checks: Reconcile operator reserve and production schedule to royalty tiers.
Obtain a primary arbitration award, settlement or disclosed claim schedule.
Refresh audited unallocated reserve each quarter.
unresolved_items: No dedicated current short-seller primary record was available in the frozen packet.
An independently reproducible reserve, production and royalty-tier depletion schedule is absent.
The arbitration record does not disclose claimed amount, timing, probability or collectibility.
